About Me

Crafting digital experiences with passion

I'm a Full Stack Developer based in Indonesia with over 3 years of experience building web applications. I specialize in React, Node.js, and modern cloud technologies.

Currently working at Arita Prima Indonesia, I focus on building scalable applications that solve real-world problems. When I'm not coding, I enjoy exploring new technologies and contributing to open-source projects.

Featured Projects

Here are some of my recent projects that showcase my skills in full-stack development.

View Demo GitHub
Featured

Water Level Monitoring

Mobile app for real-time water level monitoring with React Native, WebSocket integration, and push notifications for critical alerts.

React Native TypeScript WebSocket Node.js
View Demo GitHub

HRIS System

Human Resource Information System built with Laravel, featuring payroll management, attendance tracking, and employee self-service portal.

Laravel PHP PostgreSQL Bootstrap
View Demo GitHub
Featured

AIS Nelayan

Vessel tracking system for fishermen using AIS data, with real-time map visualization and zone management capabilities.

Next.js Mapbox Redis Docker
View Demo GitHub

FreshRSS Pipeline

Automated RSS feed aggregator with AI-powered summaries, integrated with Telegram notifications for content delivery.

Python ChromaDB Docker OpenAI
